name: archon-qwen-memoryagent
description: Archon MemoryAgent — an agent with persistent, queryable, cross-session memory built on Qwen (Alibaba Cloud Model Studio / DashScope) with a pgvector memory layer, deployable on Alibaba Cloud Function Compute.

scripts.test:unit: node --import tsx --test tests/unit/embeddings.test.ts tests/unit/narrator.test.ts tests/unit/memory.test.ts tests/unit/retrieval.test.ts tests/unit/metrics.test.ts tests/unit/consolidation.test.ts
scripts.test: node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/unit/embeddings.test.ts tests/unit/narrator.test.ts tests/unit/memory.test.ts tests/unit/retrieval.test.ts tests/unit/metrics.test.ts tests/unit/consolidation.test.ts tests/integration/pgvector-store.test.ts tests/e2e/cross-session.test.ts
